name: Eric Gill

acts.description: Diaries revealed he sexually abused his two daughters over many years
Diaries revealed he sexually abused his sister and had sexual contact with his dog

behavior_summary: His posthumously published diaries revealed systematic sexual abuse of his own children. His typography — Gill Sans, Perpetua — is embedded in the visual infrastructure of the English-speaking world.

notable_works: Stations of the Cross at Westminster Cathedral
art.summary: Created Gill Sans, one of the most widely used typefaces in the world. His typography shaped British visual culture and is baked into countless institutions.

verdict.blurb: Every time you read the BBC website, a signpost at a British train station, or a thousand other things rendered in Gill Sans, you are reading the work of a man who raped his own children and wrote about it approvingly in his diary. His victims are dead. The typeface is everywhere.
